top_signals.title: Russian envoy to skip Hiroshima peace ceremony
top_signals.summary: The annual peace ceremony will have had no Russian representative for five years in a row since the country's invasion of Ukraine began in 2022.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran Didn’t Win the War
top_signals.summary: Tehran is still losing the long game.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Edges Lower as More Supply Flows Through Strait of Hormuz - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Edges Lower as More Supply Flows Through Strait of Hormuz  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Renk Group Nears Deal to Buy UK’s David Brown Defence
top_signals.summary: Industrial machinery maker Renk Group AG is nearing a deal to acquire privately held David Brown Defence, in a move that gives it more exposure to the naval sector, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Securitize becomes first to debut shares on NYSE and onchain, but it won’t be the last
top_signals.summary: President Brett Redfearn said the firm is in discussions to tokenize other IPOs "definitely ... within the next year.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Metered electricity demand in the New York ISO falls midday because of small-scale solar
top_signals.summary: An increase in electricity generation from small-scale solar in New York has decreased the midday demand for metered electricity, amid overall declining load in the state. The trend is particularly notable in the early spring (March and April), when solar generation has an outsized impact because demand is relatively low and conditions for solar generation are favorable.
